commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `localModelLean: "auto"`, threads effective context caps into core/Codex tool construction and inventory, and updates schema, help, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +206, Tests +530, Docs +2. Total +738 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new experimental config mode rather than fixing a directly reproducible current-main bug. The PR supplies deterministic coverage for the new tool-filtering and context-cap paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is required because the PR has a protected `maintainer` label and changes compatibility-sensitive config/default behavior that automation should not decide.

target.title: feat(agents): auto-trim lean local model tools
target.body:
## Summary

- add `localModelLean: "auto"` so smaller resolved model context caps trim the browser, cron, and message tools without forcing lean mode on larger models
- route effective model context caps through core embedded runs, Codex dynamic tools, Codex side-question tools, and `tools.effective` inventory so advertised/constructed tools match runtime behavior
- accept/document the new config value across schema/help/docs, including provider-level `contextTokens` and `agents.defaults.contextTokens` caps
- bound provider-level `contextTokens` by the selected model window so provider defaults cannot overstate a smaller runtime model context

Related to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599, but does not close it. This PR only addresses the small/local model tool-surface pressure lane.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tool-build.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/context-window-guard.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/side-question.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed on rebased head before final no-overlap rebase, 4 shards / 243 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/context-window-guard.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/side-question.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed on final head `8c82b1b5b32` after rebasing onto `3aa460409ea`, 2 shards / 51 tests.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 <changed docs/core/codex/config files>` - passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint <changed core/codex/config files>` - passed.
- `node scripts/docs-list.js` - inspected docs inventory for relevant local-model/experimental docs.
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md` - passed.
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md` - passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed on final head `8c82b1b5b32`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings, overall `0.82` after the provider-cap fix was committed.
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; provider `aws`, lease `cbx_b0291e03ad40`, run `run_83d3f9a1d3d4`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, `extensionTests`, `docs`, exit `0`, cleanup `leaseStopped=true`. This ran on base `c80ec433258`; after it passed, the branch was cleanly rebased to `3aa460409ea` with no touched-file overlap and the focused regression tests above were rerun.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean: "auto"` now trims heavyweight default tools when the effective model context cap is 64K tokens or smaller, including provider/model caps, `agents.defaults.contextTokens`, core embedded runs, Codex dynamic tools, Codex side-question turns, and `tools.effective` inventory projection. Provider-level caps are also bounded by the selected model window so auto lean cannot be defeated by a larger provider default.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest/docs/format/lint checks, structured branch review, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see the Verification section above.
Evidence after fix: deterministic tests cover agent overrides, auto threshold behavior, provider-level context caps, provider caps bounded by smaller model windows, runtime tool creation, Codex app-server dynamic tools, Codex side-question tools, and `tools.effective` inventory projection.
Observed result after fix: the branch passes focused local proof and remote `pnpm check:changed` on AWS Crabbox run `run_83d3f9a1d3d4`.
What was not tested: no new live Ollama/provider runtime call was run in this refresh; this PR is verified through deterministic config/runtime tests plus the remote changed gate.
